upstream_native_model: SPP (strip packing) — minimize used width for a given strip_height; single infinite-height strip with a configurable bottom y-extent
upstream_build_log_note: Build log is reconstructed from the Cargo.toml dependencies and the binary mtime; the original 'cargo build' stdout was not preserved. The produced binary is the one used for this Q43 run (verified by mtime >= latest source mtime and successful --help invocation).

upstream_cli_args.input_desc: Path to the input JSON file, or a solution JSON file for warm starting

upstream_output_naming: final_<name>.json where <name> is the JSON 'name' field of the input
strip_vs_finite_stock: Upstream is SPP (1 strip, minimize width). Q43 maps this to a 1500x6000 strip so the geometry is comparable to two 1500x3000 sheets placed end-to-end along the long axis. Direct comparability with our finite-stock multisheet Q42 is limited; documented in report.
own_solver_source_diff_pre: empty (0 bytes) — verified by 'git diff -- rust/vrs_solver/src api worker frontend vrs_nesting'
